description: Final positive manual import patch for every metadata-stable node family accepted by strict Version 195 sandbox preflight, all production-safe member-variable categories/containers, function and graph boundaries, Widget/AI/BT subclasses, and representative UE4.27 exec/data/wildcard/literal/linked connection paths. Version 195 adds the mandatory exhaustive import contract matrix (117 cases, two fresh UE sessions, idempotent reapply) as the reusable release gate for future importer changes. Version 195 fixes the Windows PowerShell 5.1 null/scalar collection-count helper without changing durable graph import_scope identities.

required_compiled_members_before_import.name: N2C_Box
required_compiled_members_before_import.reason: K2Node_ComponentBoundEvent strict preflight resolves the component property from the compiled/skeleton class.

required_compiled_members_before_import.name: N2C_OnFinal
required_compiled_members_before_import.reason: Multicast delegate nodes resolve the dispatcher property from the compiled/skeleton class.

preconditions.setup_note: Create these two prerequisites in BP_N2C_FinalActor, Compile and Save once before importing. The JSON also contains idempotent add/update actions for them, but UE4.27 strict dry-run cannot bootstrap and consume newly compiled class members inside the same project-wide preflight.

strict_scope.included: verified, metadata-stable positive Blueprint import paths that normal strict UI import can apply

not_included.reason: requires durable graph GUID/signature/tunnel/wildcard identity exported from the exact local UE4.27 StandardMacros asset; automated fresh-process tests already PASS
coverage status is supported_untested and strict preflight blocks it without developer override
coverage status is supported_untested and strict preflight blocks it; SCS component import is included instead
constructor branches exist but Version 195 strict coverage does not classify them as verified
deferred in the release gate and requires a skeleton-bound Animation Blueprint
separate Niagara schema; full round-trip remains deferred

manual_acceptance: Import from the main Level Editor toolbar because this is N2C_PROJECT_PATCH_V1.
Dry-run must report allowed=1 for every asset entry after the compiled N2C_Box and N2C_OnFinal prerequisites exist.
Apply, compile and save every target without Blueprint compiler errors.
Close the editor, reopen the project and compile all six target Blueprints again.
Export the folder /Game/N2C_FinalManual and compare variables, defaults, node identities, pins and links.
Repeat the same import once; it must not duplicate functions, dispatchers, components, macro/collapsed graphs or built-in events.
After the repeated import, close UE again, reopen the project, compile all six targets and export once more; structural counts and links must remain unchanged.

graph_identity_rules.collapsed_graph_bound_graph_identity: Use either the exact export identity or the canonical identity that omits the generated .K2Node_Composite_<n> object segment. Version 195 canonicalizes that unstable segment during dry-run and repeat import.
graph_identity_rules.rule: Never treat the generated K2Node_Composite numeric suffix as a durable identity.
graph_identity_rules.stable_import_scope_versioning: The V193/ prefixes in import_scope are retained intentionally as durable identities. Do not rename them when bumping the plugin version, or repeat import can create duplicate graph nodes.

pin_identity_rules.make_struct_output: Use the exact StructType object name from export (for example ST_N2C_Final). UE4.27 K2Node_MakeStruct does not allocate ReturnValue.
pin_identity_rules.break_struct_input: Use the same exact StructType object name from export. UE4.27 K2Node_BreakStruct does not allocate a generic Struct pin.
pin_identity_rules.set_fields_in_struct: Use StructRef for input and StructOut for output.
pin_identity_rules.select_options: Use Option 0 and Option 1 internal PinNames for a non-enum Select. A/B and False/True are compatibility aliases only.
pin_identity_rules.spawn_actor_transform: UE4.27 SpawnActorFromClass requires SpawnTransform to be connected. Use KismetMathLibrary.MakeTransform.ReturnValue or another transform output; do not encode SpawnTransform as an unconnected pin default.
pin_identity_rules.rotator_defaults: AI JSON may use UE ImportText such as (Pitch=10.0,Yaw=20.0,Roll=30.0), but the importer must convert Vector/Rotator values to UE4.27 K2 pin format before schema-native default conversion; compiled member persistence is verified from the generated-class CDO and exporter, not from a non-empty FBPVariableDescription::DefaultValue.
